title: Setup — Sara digs, Papa+Eva enter surf
prompt: Wide cinematic shot on @beach-shore facing the surf. @Papa already mid-frame, knee-deep in the gentle blue-green surf, holding @Eva up on his shoulders with both hands gripping her ankles for safety. Eva curly blonde with rainbow bow, hands held high above her head laughing huge as a small wave splashes against Papa's legs. Sun glittering on the wet sand at the tide line. Sara is OUT OF FRAME (off-camera digging on the dry sand behind the camera). Papa (booming happy laugh): "SQUEEZE my shoulders kiddo — wave incoming!" Eva (squealing with delight): "HIIIGHER, Daddy! HIIIGHER!" A small wave laps in. Papa staggers playfully, Eva shrieks with joy.
